prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your hobby photography forward
items: Research and compare 3 beginner-friendly DSLR or mirrorless cameras within your budget
Practice manual camera settings by photographing the same subject in aperture priority, shutter priority, and full manual modes
Study and document the lighting conditions in 5 different locations you could use for photography practice
Take 100 practice photos using only your camera\
Learn and practice the rule of thirds by composing 25 photos using your camera\
Read and complete a beginner photography course or tutorial series covering exposure basics
